problem id: cc5011ac
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) OR SHR(3)

examples:
  10101110 -> 01011101
  00111011 -> 01110111
  00001101 -> 00011011
  11011001 -> 10111011
  00011000 -> 00110011
  01010100 -> 10101010
  10001110 -> 00011101
  11001100 -> 10011001

query: 11101110
predicted answer: 11011101
